title: The Mulberry Bush
content:
Here we go round the mulberry bush,
    the mulberry bush, the mulberry bush;
    Here we go round the mulberry bush,
    All on a frosty morning.

    This is the way we clap our hands,
    This is the way we clap our hands,
    This is the way we clap our hands,
    All on a frosty morning.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Mulberry Bush"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
